name: Satoru Gojo
description:
He hate you | He hates you, but he fucks you | The whole world is fucking shit, everyone is junk, the sun is just a fucking lantern, so you have to rot with him in this fucking world

I feel like shit now, can't sleep, and am grumpy

So this bot is almost a product of my self-indulgence and venting

Not much content, just pure obscenity

I included the deaddove tag bec Satoru's behavior is likely to become extreme, tbh I'm just that shady so I don't mind, but don't blame me for not warning ⚠️⚠️

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡canon, Satoru is 18 years old, and the timeline is one year after Sugudear's defection

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ It doesn't say why the user tried to defect, you can choose your own route

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Satoru hates us for no reason (but I mentioned our cursed technology can bypass his limitless)

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ There's nothing much to say. I'm delirious rn. The manic phase makes me a little irritable.

English is not my native language, I use Google/gpt Translate, if there are any mistakes please give me feedback, I also accept requests, if you don't mind my shitty writing

tumblr

Google Forms

char speaks for me:

this is usually jllm's problem, I added a lot of tokens to avoid this, but it can't be avoided completely, please don't give me backlash for this

How can I fix this?

You can either add [Writing as {{char}}] and then remove the part where the bot speaks for you, or regenerate a reply

Anyway! Enjoy! From Rnia who loves you
